commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The PR is a viable landing candidate, but maintainer acceptance is needed for the additive public plugin hook fields; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.; Cleared: No dependency, workflow, secret, or code-execution surface changes were found; the new plugin-visible metadata is sourced from the existing visibility-filtered inbound context path. (sha=e5be0440cc84a3e26959da8d6f96f14170c5a4ac)
commands.review_summary:
The PR carries finalized inbound reply metadata through canonical hook mapping, before_dispatch payloads, plugin hook types/docs/tests, with one unrelated qa-lab formatting hunk.

PR surface: Source +59, Tests +91, Docs +2. Total +152 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not run a live Discord setup. Current main finalizes ReplyTo* fields, then the canonical hook mapper and before_dispatch payload omit them before plugin hooks run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is a viable landing candidate, but maintainer acceptance is needed for the additive public plugin hook fields; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: fix(hooks): expose inbound reply metadata before dispatch
target.body:
Fixes #88521.

## Summary

- Carry `replyToId`, `replyToBody`, and `replyToSender` from finalized inbound context into canonical hook context and plugin message contexts.
- Expose those fields through `before_dispatch` event/context types.
- Add docs for the new first-class reply metadata fields.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed: Discord reply metadata was finalized into inbound context fields, but plugin `before_dispatch` hooks could not see the replied-to message id/body/sender and therefore could not implement reply-aware commands through the public hook API.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout at `/Users/andy/openclaw-88521`, branch `fix/discord-reply-hook-context-88521`, commit `d58abce0b7`.

Exact steps or command run after the patch:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/hooks/message-hook-mappers.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts
node --import tsx --input-type=module <redacted-hook-mapper-proof>
git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  14 passed (14)
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  188 passed (188)
[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 11.28s

{
  "canonical": {
    "replyToId": "quoted-message-redacted",
    "replyToBody": "quoted body redacted",
    "replyToSender": "quoted-sender-redacted"
  },
  "beforeDispatchContext": {
    "replyToId": "quoted-message-redacted",
    "replyToBody": "quoted body redacted",
    "replyToSender": "quoted-sender-redacted"
  }
}

e5be0440cc Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com> Expose reply metadata to before_dispatch hooks
```

Observed result after fix: A finalized inbound context with `ReplyToId`, `ReplyToBody`, and `ReplyToSender` now reaches the canonical hook context and the plugin-visible `before_dispatch` context as `replyToId`, `replyToBody`, and `replyToSender`.

What was not tested: I did not connect to a live Discord gateway; the proof uses a redacted finalized Discord-shaped context through the real hook mapper path and focused dispatch tests.

## Notes

- Maintainer can modify: enabled.
